response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00-04:06: Song 'JANE DOE' identified. Search indicated this title, when associated with Kenshi Yonezu, is likely fictional or misattributed in search results regarding Chainsaw Man, suggesting the song in the video is an original cover or specific performance. Lyrics were transcribed from the video.
2. 04:06-05:03: Song 'Gaze on Me!' identified. Lyrics transcribed from the video.
3. Lyrics for both were transcribed directly from the audio as they are not standard commercial tracks with widely available official lyrics online.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two separate musical performances. The first, 'JANE DOE', is performed by IRyS and Shirakami Fubuki. The second, 'Gaze on Me!', is performed by IRyS and two Shirakami Fubuki models.

scenes.description: IRyS and Shirakami Fubuki perform the song 'JANE DOE'. They sing and dance together on a stage in front of a stadium crowd.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[TRANSCRIPTION]
まるで この世界で
二人だけみたいだね
...
なんて 少しだけ 夢を見てしまっただけ
...
その先に 月明かり
花束の香り
...
ガラスの上の 裸足のまま歩く
いたむごとに 血が流れて落ちていく
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[TRANSCRIPTION]
As if, in this world
It seems like it's just the two of us
...
Just dreamt a little, that's all
...
Moonlight ahead
Scent of a bouquet
...
Walking barefoot on glass
With every pain, blood flows and falls
...

scenes.description: IRyS and two Shirakami Fubuki models perform the song 'Gaze on Me!'. The performance features dynamic lighting and synchronized choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[TRANSCRIPTION]
揺らせ 一秒 かけたら Summer girls
夢の道は ストレート
...
視線 誰にも譲れない
Please Gaze on Me!
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[TRANSCRIPTION]
Shake it for one second and you're Summer girls
The road of dreams is straight
...
Gaze that I won't give to anyone
Please Gaze on Me!
...
